name: Peninsula Park
description:
This is our opportunity to contribute to get dedicated pickleball courts!

Peninsula Park Public Survey

The Department of Recreation & Parks is seeking public input on potential enhancements to Peninsula Park with a survey available until April 29, 2024. Please note that decisions have not been finalized. Visit the survey dedicated to collecting public opinions on the potential additions here: aarecparks.org/palparksurvey
